---
title: "Cases"
---

Two cases; memos are due on Canvas at **1:00 pm** on the discussion day.

## Case 1: FeedBurner

**"Lather, Rinse, Repeat": FeedBurner's Serial Founding Team** (HBS 9-809-089)

| | |
|:--|:--|
| **Assigned** | Wednesday, September 2 |
| **Due** | Wednesday, September 16 at 1:00 pm |
| **Discussed** | Wednesday, September 16 |
| **Groups** | Up to 4 students; 4 pages or less plus calculations |

**Case packet:** HBS coursepack / Canvas (licensed — not hosted on this site).

**Interactive discussion site:** <span class="locked-link">Unlocks after class on September 16</span>  
→ [Feedburner discussion site](discussion-sites/feedburner/) *(available after the 4:10 pm section)*

---

## Case 2: Solstice Robotics

**Solstice Robotics: Three Inboxes and a Tender Offer** (original course case — tax consequences of employee stock options)

| | |
|:--|:--|
| **Assigned** | Monday, September 21 (Canvas) |
| **Due** | Wednesday, September 30 at 1:00 pm |
| **Discussed** | Wednesday, September 30 |
| **Groups** | Up to 4 students; 4 pages or less plus calculations |

**Case packet:** Canvas only (graded memo).

**Interactive discussion site:** <span class="locked-link">Unlocks after class on September 30</span>  
→ [Solstice discussion site](discussion-sites/solstice/) *(available after the 4:10 pm section)*

---

## Memo format

- Answer the questions distributed with each case
- One submission per group on Canvas
- Due at **1:00 pm** — start of the first section — on the discussion day

## FreshBites 409A mini-case

Ungraded self-check distributed with Session 5 prep. Suitable for public posting when available in `materials/`.
